tasks.method: Use scatter plots to visualize the relationship between water consumption and crop yield for different irrigation methods (V1). Apply brushing and linking across plots for coordinated exploration (I2).
tasks.objective: Identify trends and correlations between water consumption and yield efficiency across irrigation methods.

tasks.method: Generate box plots grouped by irrigation method and district to characterize distributions and detect outliers (V2). Include dropdown filters for district and crop (I1).
tasks.objective: Understand the general efficiency and variations in water consumption and associated yield metrics across districts and methods.

tasks.method: Compute 'Water Usage Efficiency' as a derived metric (Yield per unit water consumed). Visualize using heat maps for spatial analysis across districts and crop types (V4). Add hover interactions for precise values (I3).
tasks.objective: Identify high-efficiency districts, crop types, and irrigation methods for optimization recommendations.

tasks.method: Sort bar charts by 'Water Usage Efficiency' and highlight anomalies with extreme values (V3, I5). Allow toggling to switch between aggregate and detailed charts (I6).
tasks.objective: Detect anomalies in water usage efficiency and yield output, guiding investigation into best and worst practices.

tasks.method: Use scatter plots to examine correlations between water availability, water consumption, and yield across districts (V1). Add slider for filtering water consumption ranges dynamically (I4).
tasks.objective: Analyze the impact of resource availability on water usage efficiency and yield in different districts.

tasks.method: Create pie charts with numerical annotations to display proportional usage of different irrigation methods across districts (V6).
tasks.objective: Identify irrigation method preferences and patterns for targeted strategy development in water resource management.

tasks.method: Utilize line charts to illustrate trends in water consumption and yield over time for different irrigation methods (V5). Add filtering interactions by crop and district (I1).
tasks.objective: Discover temporal trends in water usage and yield across irrigation methods to inform future practices.

tasks.method: Highlight districts and crops with the maximum efficiency ratio using ranked bar charts (V3), and enable sorting by crop type and district (I5).
tasks.objective: Identify top-performing crops and districts in terms of water usage efficiency.
